# Creative Style — tao-slide

## Color Scheme

| Role | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Primary | `8B5CF6` | Headings, main accent (purple) |
| Accent | `F59E0B` | Highlights, callouts (amber) |
| Background | `FFFBEB` | Warm light background |
| Text Dark | `1E1B4B` | Body text (deep indigo) |
| Text Light | `FFFFFF` | Text on colored backgrounds |
| Surface | `EDE9FE` | Cards, callout backgrounds (light purple) |
| Secondary | `FEF3C7` | Alternate surface (light amber) |

## Font Pairing

- **Heading**: Poppins (Bold/SemiBold)
- **Body**: Open Sans (Regular)

## Layout Rules

- Warm gradient backgrounds: subtle amber → purple transitions
- Rounded blob shapes as decorative background elements
- Asymmetric layouts: text left + visual right (or vice versa)
- Bold color blocks for callouts and key points
- Oversized emoji or icon accents where appropriate
- Alternating background colors between sections
- Rounded corners on all shapes (16px+ radius)
- Playful spacing — generous padding

## When to Use

- Marketing presentations, event decks
- Creative pitches, brand presentations
- Workshop slides, training materials
- Any context where "creative", "playful", or "colorful" is mentioned
